calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Tang appeared by zoom for Filbert Fong.

Mrs. Tang stated that she does not think there is any potential conflict between the client and herself by representing Filbert and having represented Hanley. The court noted that Hanley failed to make a court ordered distribution, that the estate has grown, that Hanley represented to the Court that this estate had only cash and questions where the mutual funds came from. Mrs. Tang stated that the parties have been noticed of this hearing, that Ray died in 2006, that an order for final distribution was issued and that she does not know why Hanley didn't move everything to the trust. Mrs. Tang also stated that once they fill the appointment, they will have access to the mutual funds, that they can then find out what happened and that the order for final distribution has an omnibus clause that states that all property not known or to be discovered is go to the trust. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
